original text:
Em Stafrace| Just a Girl with Ideas: SPREADING SOME CHRISTMAS CHEER!
It's me!
Do you remember me?
I know it seems like I have been neglecting my blog yet again, but you know how it is time slips by pretty quickly and before you know it the year is coming to an end.
Jeepers I am completely in a spin, but I have managed to get all my Christmas shopping wrapped and packaged for the postie to deliver some Christmas cheer to family down south.
I have been busy creating lots of Christmas kits and nifty packs which is partly why I have not been here sharing with you any of my pages so thought I'd better stop by and post a few and yep I have a few arghh.
All these pages feature my BERRY & FAWN | COLLECTION and some nifty packs I made called ALL PRIMED UP | PAPER PACK, GLITTER SPILLS | CHRISTMAS ACCENTS and lastly TAPE IT UP Vol.2 | CHRISTMAS WASHI TAPE.
Ooh and all the pages that feature photos of the lil' cuties Miss Morgan and Master Tristan playing in the snow are courtesy of one of my all time fave photographers and friends the fabulous Wendy Otterness.
So that's it for 2015 my last post for the year, I am looking forward to 2016...bring it on I say!
Wishing you all an amazing Christmas spent with family and friends and of course don't forget to see 2016 in with a smile on your dial, laughing, snuggling or enjoying a midnight feast of left overs!

National V.P.
School Gallery | Launceston Then!
24 images of National V.P.
Primary School and its replacement St. Catherines C of E School and all their pupils from the past.
The National School, St. Thomas Road.
Photo by John Neale.
The National School building in 2014.
National School c.1920's with Charles Causley 2nd on the left in the middle row.
National School.
Photo courtesy of Kathryn Hill.
National School 1953 Launceston Music Festival Winners trained by Miss Stanbury, pianist Charles Causley.
Lennard Hodge, Barbara Watkins, Edward Hutchings, Mary Kerslake, John Maguire.
Leonard Stanmore, Gwen Harris, Geoffrey Parish, Mary Lake, Myrtle Stephens.
Photo Courtesy of Beryl Parish.
National School Boys Choir in 1954.
National V.P.
School boys choir who won the Curtis Cup for best choir at the 1954 Launceston Music Festival.
National V.P.
School Choir in 1954/55.
Photo courtesy of Tarry Barriball.
A group of children from the National School visit the Launceston Fanciers Show in the Town Hall in 1959.
National School Maypole Dancers with the Mayor and Mayores of Launceston, Tasmania in 1961.
National School Choir in 1962.
National School Choir in 1964.
National School in 1962. .
National School Nativity play from 1967-68.
Photo courtesy of Naomi Scudamore.

Photo courtesy of Kathryn Martin.
St. Catherines School 1978.
Photo courtesy of Paddy Curtis.
St. Catherines 76-77 Photo courtesy of Nick Dyne.
